2025-12-09.name: 2025-12-09 - Strength: Lower Body + Core
2025-12-09.focus_areas: Lower body emphasis: posterior chain (glutes, hamstrings, single-leg RDLs), hip stabilizers (lateral band work, clamshells), calf strength (single-leg calf raises). Secondary: core anti-rotation (Pallof press, dead bugs)

2025-12-11.name: 2025-12-11 - Strength: Upper Body Push/Pull
2025-12-11.focus_areas: Upper body push/pull balance: horizontal pushing (push-ups, bench variations), vertical/horizontal pulling (rows, lat pulldowns), shoulder stability. Secondary: anterior core (planks, hollow holds), hip flexor/quad balance work

2025-12-13.name: 2025-12-13 - Strength: Full Body Integration
2025-12-13.focus_areas: Full body integration: compound movements (goblet squats, step-ups), integrated core (bird dogs, side planks with leg lifts), dynamic stability (single-leg balance work). Lighter total volume to respect Sunday's easy run.

2025-12-08.running_fingerprint: 2025-12-10:Run: 35 min E:False|2025-12-12:Run: 40 min E:False|2025-12-14:Run: 45 min E:False
